name: Exactus, Inc.
summary: Exactus, Inc. produces and supplies hemp and hemp-derived products in the United States. It provides cannabidiol (CBD) feminized genetics, high cannabigerol (CBG) feminized genetics, hemp-derived specialty ingredients, and white-label products to the cosmetic, wellness, food, beverage, pharmaceutical, and pet industries. The company's specialty ingredients include CBD, CBG, CBN, and CBC isolates; CBD and CBG distillates; CBD water-soluble; CBD and CBG biomass; CBD AND CBG flowers; and CBD crude oil. It also provides a range of custom manufactured specialty cannabinoid products, such as skincare products, pain creams, tinctures, bath bombs, soft gels, balms, pet products, supplements, and other products. The company is based in Delray Beach, Florida. Exactus, Inc. is a subsidiary of Ceed2Med, LLC.
